LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF 690 MARKET CLUB OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF MAKING ANOTHER CLAIM FOR EXEMPTION IF JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S SITUATION CHANGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, JON HAUPERT'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SUBMITS A FINANCIAL STATEMENT SHOWING INCOME OF $9,293.46 PER MONTH AND EXPENSES OF $6,385.23 PER MONTH. ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT INCLUDED A NOTATION STATING THE FUNDS FROM THE ADOPTIVE AID PROGRAM WILL END IN FEBRUARY 2015, DEFENDANT DOES NOT REFLECT THIS INFORMATION IN THE FINANCIAL STATEMENT. THE COURT CANNOT MAKE A DETERMINATION BASED ON AN OUTDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENT AS TO WHETHER DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO A CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SARA LERSCHEN, CSR #6213 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JON HAUPERT, TEL. NO. (916) 878-6512, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. JON HAUPERT'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Denied without prejudice. Defendant submits a financial statement showing income of $9,293.46 per month and expenses of $6,385.23 per month. Although Defendant included a notation stating the funds from the adoptive aid program will end in February 2015, Defendant does not reflect this information in the financial statement. The Court cannot make a determination based on an outdated financial statement as to whether Defendant is entitled to a claim of exemption. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213 =302/ehg

Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAIPO K. B. YOUNG OF THE BARTLETT, LEADER-PICONE & YOUNG, LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 444-2404 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JON HAUPERT, TEL. NO. (916) 878-6512, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF 690 MARKET CLUB OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Denied without prejudice of making another claim for exemption if Judgment Debtor's situation changes. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
